chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2618 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 13.09.2023 Mr. Ayaz Khaskheli associate of Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondents No.1 to 4. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This is a petition which seeks regularization of service. Learned AAG has pointed out that he was on daily wages in terms of a letter of 8th April 2014. Three individuals were appointed on daily wages at Rs.355/- per day for about 03 months. Whereafter no letter whatsoever is available on record. This petition was filed after almost 03 years which seeks regularization. His appointment was only on the basis of a letter which was on daily wages and hence cannot seek regularization even on the strength of a contention that two of the other employees have been regularized. The petitioner has to come out with some law which he fails as far as regularization of the petitioner is concerned. This being a situation and the reasons explained the petition merits no consideration and is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
